wonder: Can I build a game space that other people will play?
activity_summary: Learner used in-game creation tools to build and host a multiplayer game space. Other players joined and interacted with the created environment.
learner_explanation: I made a place for people to play. They joined and played in it.

parent_review.review_note: Accepted as evidence of tool discovery, game design, public runtime awareness, and systems thinking.

subject_mappings.subject: technology
subject_mappings.evidence_note: Learner used digital creation tools and hosted a playable environment.

subject_mappings.subject: engineering
subject_mappings.evidence_note: Learner configured an interactive system with rules, space, and user behavior.

subject_mappings.subject: social studies
subject_mappings.evidence_note: Learner observed how other players interacted with a shared environment.

evidence_items.description: Parent observed that other players joined the hosted environment.

next_questions: What did players do that you expected?
What did players do that surprised you?
What would you change in the next version?
non_capture_note: This receipt records one learning event and should not be used as a fixed identity label.
